task_completion.description: Verify the pipeline uses the Haversine function in utils.py for geospatial distance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VS Code editor showing code that imports or calls a Haversine function (likely from utils.py) to calculate distance.

task_completion.description: Verify the altitude is checked against alt_rel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VS Code editor showing a conditional statement or assignment where altitude is compared to or uses the 'alt_rel' variable or column.

task_completion.description: Verify vibration magnitude is calculated using Root Mean Square (RMS).
task_completion.visual_evidence: VS Code editor showing a mathematical calculation for RMS (e.g., square root of the sum of squares) applied to vibration data.

task_completion.description: Verify battery voltage is scaled dynamically using config.BATTERY_CELLS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VS Code editor showing battery voltage being divided or multiplied by 'config.BATTERY_CELLS'.

task_completion.description: Verify flight duration is converted from microseconds (time_us) to seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VS Code editor showing 'time_us' being divided by 1,000,000 or a similar mathematical conversion to seconds.

task_completion.description: Verify main.py runs without errors and flags safety violations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VS Code terminal showing the execution of 'python main.py' completing successfully without Python tracebacks or error messages.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a proper code editor (like VS Code) to modify the files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the script to test for errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal panel shows the actual command execution and output, not just a mocked text file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent implemented the actual logic rather than hardcoding the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code in the editor shows genuine mathematical and logical operations, not hardcoded print statements or boolean bypasses to fake safety violation flags.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent is acting as a Robotics Engineer in the Architecture and Engineering industry. The pass threshold is 60 points. The pipeline processes synthetically generated drone flight log data (CSV).
